samples.xml_description:
<module id="div_8bit">
    <description>A simplified radix-2 divider for 8-bit signed or unsigned integers.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">The clock signal for synchronous operation.</input>
        <input id="rst">The reset signal to initialize or reset the module.</input>
        <input id="sign">Indicates if the operation is signed (1) or unsigned (0).</input>
        <input id="dividend" width_description="[7:0]">The 8-bit input signal representing the dividend for division.</input>
        <input id="divisor" width_description="[7:0]">The 8-bit input signal representing the divisor for division.</input>
        <input id="opn_valid">A 1-bit input signal indicating that a valid operation request is present.</input>
        <input id="res_ready">A 1-bit input signal indicating that the 16-bit output result has already been acknowledged.</input>
        <output id="res_valid">A 1-bit output signal indicating the result is valid and ready.</output>
        <output id="result" width_description="[15:0]">The 16-bit output containing the remainder in the upper 8 bits and the quotient in the lower 8 bits.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <state id="IDLE">Idle state.</state>
        <state id="DIVIDE">Divide state.</state>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="sequential_logic">
        <reg id="res_valid_reg" type="1_bit" init_value="0"/>
        <reg id="start_cnt" type="1_bit" init_value="0"/>
        <reg id="cnt" type="4_bit" init_value="0"/>
        <reg id="neg_divisor" type="9_bit" init_value="0"/>
        <reg id="dividend_abs" type="8_bit" init_value="0"/>
        <reg id="divisor_abs" type="8_bit" init_value="0"/>
        <reg id="result_reg" type="16_bit" init_value="0"/>
        <reg id="SR" type="17_bit" init_value="0"/>
        <always_comb>
            if(rst == 1'b1)begin
                res_valid = 1'b0;
            end else if(cnt[3] == 1'b1 && cnt != 4'd8)begin
                res_valid = 1'b0;
            end else if(res_valid == 1'b1 && res_ready == 1'b1)begin
                res_valid = 1'b0;
            end else begin
                res_valid = res_valid_reg;
            end
        end
        <always @(posedge clk) begin
            if(opn_valid == 1'b1 && res_valid == 1'b0)begin
                dividend_abs <= (sign == 1'b1)? ((dividend[7] == 1'b1)? (~dividend + 1'b1): dividend): dividend;
                divisor_abs <= (sign == 1'b1)? ((divisor[7] == 1'b1)? (~divisor + 1'b1): divisor): divisor;
                SR <= {dividend_abs, 1'b0};
                neg_divisor <= (sign == 1'b1)? ~{divisor_abs, 1'b0}+1'b1 : ~{divisor_abs, 1'b0};
                cnt <= 4'd1;
                start_cnt <= 1'b1;
            end else if(start_cnt == 1'b1)begin
                if(cnt[3] == 1'b1)begin
                    cnt <= 4'd0;
                    start_cnt <= 1'b0;
                    SR <= {SR[16:9], 1'b0};
                    result_reg <= (sign == 1'b1)? (((dividend[7] ^ divisor[7]) == 1'b1)? (~SR[16:9]+1'b1): SR[16:9]): SR[16:9];
                end else begin
                    cnt <= cnt + 1'b1;
                    SR <= {SR[16:9], 1'b0};
                    case(SR[8])
                        1'b0: SR[8:0] <= SR[8:0] + neg_divisor;
                        default: SR[8:0] <= SR[8:0];
                    endcase
                end
            end
        end
        <always @(posedge clk) begin
            if(rst == 1'b1)begin
                res_valid_reg <= 1'b0;
            end else if(cnt[3] == 1'b1 && cnt != 4'd8)begin
                res_valid_reg <= 1'b1;
            end else if(res_valid == 1'b1 && res_ready == 1'b1)begin
                res_valid_reg <= 1'b0;
            end
        end
    </implementation>
</module>
samples.sc_log: TopModule.sv:21: sorry: constant selects in always_* processes are not currently supported (all bits will be included).
